title: API socket directory /var/run/wireguard is hardcoded
body: device/api.rs hardcodes SOCK_DIR to /var/run/wireguard/, so running boringtun in a container or as a non-root developer setup without that path writable fails with no config or env var to override it.

title: tun_darwin.rs and tun_linux.rs have diverging feature support
body: Some device configuration handled in tun_linux.rs doesn't have an equivalent code path in tun_darwin.rs, and there's no documented list of which options are Linux-only versus supported on macOS as well.

title: Handshake rate limiter thresholds aren't configurable
body: noise/rate_limiter.rs uses fixed constants for the handshake rate limit, making it hard to tune boringtun for deployments with a very high number of concurrent peers without patching the source.

title: Clarify constant-time guarantees in handshake.rs
body: noise/handshake.rs performs several cryptographic comparisons while processing handshake messages, but it isn't documented which comparisons are constant-time versus which simply rely on the underlying crypto crate's own guarantees.
